name: Pad Thai
recipeIngredient: 1 whole chicken breast, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice noodles in a large bowl. Cover with water; soak 30-45 minutes.
2. Cut chicken into 1 1/2 x 3-inch strips.
3. Cut shrimp in half lengthwise; set aside.
4. Combine water, fish sauce, sugar, lime juice, paprika, and cayenne pepper in a small bowl; set aside.
5. Reserve 1/4 of bean sprouts for topping; combine remaining sprouts and onions.
6. Drain noodles.
7. Heat a wok over medium heat for 2 minutes.
8. Push chicken to one side.
9. Break egg into the wok. Stir quickly to break up the yolk and scramble the egg. When the egg is set, mix with the chicken.
10. Add drained noodles, shrimp, fish sauce mixture, and 3 tablespoons peanuts. Cook and stir over high heat for 2-3 minutes.
11. Spoon onto a heated platter. Sprinkle with reserved bean sprouts, then with remaining peanuts.
